query: SELECT id, name, images FROM products WHERE images IS NOT NULL AND CHAR_LENGTH(images) < 10 LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT id, name, images FROM products WHERE images IS NOT NULL AND CHAR_LENGTH(images) < 10 LIMIT 10;
